_note: Ordinary everyday fact-changes (non-sensitive) that SHOULD leave memory holding the current truth (old retired, new live). sensitive_controls MUST NOT auto-erase. Generated by a 9-dimension fan-out + curator.

ordinary.old: I live in Boston.
ordinary.new: I moved to Denver last month.
ordinary.current_truth: The user now lives in Denver.

ordinary.new: We just bought a house out in the suburbs and moved in over the weekend.
ordinary.current_truth: The user now lives in a house in the suburbs, not the Mission District apartment.
